3. Should XP Have a Final Endgame Use?

✔ XP can be spent to buy a grade boost for participation OR extra research time.

🚀 Version 5.0 now unites narrative structure, skill-based mastery, hero’s journey integration, and literary allusions in a fully gamified system.

🚀 This version locks in the storytelling mechanics, layered transitions, redemption system depth, XP economy, and final week payoff.

📜 1. Transitions & Narrative Framing for Every Section
